name: Tash Wa Rash
overview: In a comedy framework, the valuation arrives at the house of Abu Saud, who inherited it from his father, so he decides to resign from his work, and one of the senior family of Al-Farij gives him the money he wants, provided that he returns them to him upon receipt of the valuation amount, but after the final review of the valuation committee, he discovers that the registrar of the house in another name.

trailers.title: مركز الابرق للانتاج الفني والمسرحي طش ورش ح1
